intro.title: Where you live should be a <highlight>choice</highlight>, not a limitation
intro.info: 147 residency permits secured across 8 jurisdictions since 2018

possibilities.title: Eight jurisdictions. One standard of case management.
possibilities.additionalInfo: We match the jurisdiction to your profile, not the other way around. Each destination is managed by an on-site team.

montenegro.title: Montenegro
montenegro.ourExperience: Operating in Montenegro since 2013. We manage your case from the initial consultation to the issuance of your card.
montenegro.hook: A direct path to residency without property purchase. Ideal for passive income earners and remote professionals.

spain.title: Spain
spain.ourExperience: Full support from apostille to local registration in Spain. Our on-site partner handles all communications with the consulate.
spain.hook: Schengen residency with living rights for the entire family. Income can be verified via remote employment or contracts.

serbia.title: Serbia
serbia.ourExperience: Assisting with address registration, bank account opening, and residency application. We know the local compliance specifics of each district.
serbia.hook: A clear pathway to permanent residency in three years. Minimal physical presence requirements.

france.title: France
france.ourExperience: We prepare your dossier tailored to Prefecture requirements, monitor timeframes, and guide you through every stage.
france.hook: One of the few paths to the EU without real estate investment. Suitable for professionals and independent earners.

malta.title: Malta
malta.ourExperience: Working alongside licensed Maltese agents. Comprehensive guidance through the naturalization track.
malta.hook: The only EU citizenship via naturalization through an investment track. The passport grants visa-free access to 185 countries.

greece.title: Greece
greece.importantText: Golden Visa / Residency by Real Estate Investment
greece.ourExperience: We coordinate legal support for the transaction and the residency application in a single streamlined process.
greece.hook: The most accessible Golden Visa in the EU. Zero physical presence requirements—the card remains valid under any travel schedule.

cyprus.title: Cyprus
cyprus.ourExperience: Helping restructure assets for Cypriot residency. We collaborate directly with local attorneys and banks.
cyprus.hook: Low tax burden and an English-speaking environment. Residency without mandatory stay requirements, tailored for business.

hungary.title: Hungary
hungary.importantText: Guest Investor Visa / Residency by Investment
hungary.ourExperience: Monitoring the program since its launch. Guiding clients based on current regulations without outdated templates.
hungary.hook: A new program with a secure entry point into the EU. Well-suited for digital entrepreneurs and investors.

armenia.title: Armenia
armenia.importantText: Residency via Sole Proprietorship / LLC Registration
armenia.ourExperience: We incorporate your company and process residency within a single trip. Experts in Yerevan banking compliance.
armenia.hook: A fast track for entrepreneurs and IT professionals. Residency without real estate investment requirements.

georgia.title: Georgia
georgia.ourExperience: We manage real estate acquisition and residency registration concurrently. Working directly with the local registry.
georgia.hook: Territorial taxation system. One of the fastest residency options in the region.

uae.title: UAE
uae.ourExperience: Processing in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, including Emirates ID and bank account opening. Designed for investors and founders.
uae.hook: Zero personal income tax and a residency status valid for up to 10 years.

portugal.title: Portugal
portugal.ourExperience: We arrange NIF, bank accounts, and residency applications remotely. Complete support during your AIMA interview.
portugal.hook: A straight path to permanent residency and citizenship in 5 years. No mandatory real estate investment required.

italy.title: Italy
italy.ourExperience: Assisting with document translation and legalization for the Italian consulate. Rigorous monitoring of submission deadlines.
italy.hook: Residency for independent earners and retirees without working rights. Full access to the Italian national healthcare system.

thailand.title: Thailand
thailand.ourExperience: Selecting the optimal visa track tailored to your profile—from remote work to retirement options.
thailand.hook: A 5-to-10-year visa without strict real estate ties. Suitable for remote professionals and retirees.

vanuatu.title: Vanuatu
vanuatu.ourExperience: Coordinating due diligence and remote application processing. One of the fastest passport issuance timelines globally.
vanuatu.hook: Visa-free access to Schengen and the UK. The fastest citizenship-by-investment program available.

process.title: Three stages. From profile evaluation to your residency card.

step_1.title: Initial Assessment
step_1.text: We evaluate your profile, income sources, and objectives. Our team selects the optimal jurisdiction and program where your case has the highest probability of success.

step_2.title: Document Preparation
step_2.text: We compile the full application package, managing professional translation and notarization. Every document is rigorously vetted before submission to the authorities.

step_3.title: Approval & Post-Landing
step_3.text: We submit the file, monitor its processing status, and provide comprehensive post-approval support: bank account opening, tax registration, and residency renewals.

aboutUs.title: We manage cases from within the jurisdiction, not from a distance.
aboutUs.text: Since 2013, the Aurion team has operated on-site in Montenegro, and since 2018, we have secured 147 residency permits across six jurisdictions. We accept a limited number of cases at any given time—ensuring your file is managed by a dedicated specialist, not processed in a queue.

team.title: On-Site Team Since 2013
team.text: We handle cases from the inside rather than working remotely—reducing processing timelines and mitigating submission risks.

specialist.title: One Specialist, One Case
specialist.text: You work with a dedicated expert from your initial consultation through to the issuance of your card.

continious.title: Post-Approval Support
continious.text: Bank account opening, tax identification number setup, and residency renewals are integrated into our scope, not sold as extras.

cases.title: Cases brought to residency card completion.

montenegroBusiness.outcome: Residency for a family of four under a single application.
montenegroBusiness.description: The primary applicant verified passive income, securing residency for themselves, their spouse, and two children within one submission.

spainNomad.outcome: A Digital Nomad Visa for a remote professional.
spainNomad.description: An IT professional verified income from foreign contracts and obtained Schengen residency with the right to live in the EU.

UAE.outcome: 10-Year Golden Visa for an IT company founder
UAE.description: The founder secured long-term residency alongside their Emirates ID and a corporate bank account without leaving the country.

finalCta.title: Program requirements change quarterly. Submitting today means relying on yesterday's criteria.
finalCta.text: During a 30-minute consultation, we will evaluate your profile and outline realistic timelines for your chosen jurisdiction.

footer.description: An AI platform designed for the valuation, forecasting, and comparison of land and real estate values across international markets.

privacy.ru: Ваши данные защищены и никогда не передаются третьим лицам.
privacy.en: Your data is protected and will never be shared with third parties.
